tools.description: Return one compact journey-first operator cockpit across attention, queue, runs, readiness, and publication state.

attention_limit.description: Maximum attention and queue items per window (1-50).

cursor.description: Zero-based offset into the full attention record lists for paging.

detail.description: Full-detail (true) vs compact (false); overrides 'mode' when supplied.

mode.description: Packet altitude: 'full' (default) or 'compact' (thinned, bounded under the token cap).

sections.description: Optional subset of cockpit sections to emit.

tools.name: attention.cockpit
tools.title: Attention Cockpit

tools.description: Apply normal bounded previews under standing safe-write authorization; break-glass previews still require human confirmation. Fail closed on tampering, stale baselines, or expiry. Publication stays separate.

confirm.description: Required only when the preview authorization mode is human_confirmation.

content.description: Complete Markdown file content, including YAML frontmatter when needed.

file_path.description: Safe object-local Markdown file path such as INSTRUCTIONS.md or skills/name/SKILL.md.

object_path.description: Directory-backed durable KB object path that owns the file.

body.description: Complete Markdown body for the section.

heading.description: Markdown section heading text without leading # characters.

object_path.description: Durable KB object path whose Markdown surface should be updated.

surface.description: Allowed Markdown surface: state or links.

field_path.description: Dotted YAML field path such as status.current or profile.stage.

object_path.description: Durable KB object path whose YAML surface should be updated.

surface.description: Allowed YAML surface: metadata, publication, or artifacts.

value.description: JSON/YAML-compatible value to assign at the field path.

object_path.description: Durable KB object path whose log.md should receive the entry.

text.description: Complete Markdown log entry to prepend to the object log.md.

child_path.description: Optional full child object path; must be a direct child under parent_path.

child_slug.description: Direct child slug to create under parent_path.

object_kind.description: Semantic object kind such as manuscript, report, or object.

parent_path.description: Existing directory-backed object or tracker path that should own the child.

state_markdown.description: Optional complete state.md body. Defaults to a title-only state.

situation_yaml.description: Writable Situation delta. Send only fields being changed; do not echo the object.context read model or derived fields.
Writable Situation delta. Send only fields being changed; do not echo the object.context read model or derived fields.
Writable Situation delta. Send only fields being changed; do not echo the object.context read model or derived fields.

due_date.description: Optional due date in YYYY-MM-DD or natural operator form.

entity_path.description: Optional canonical entity path for the TODO.

notes.description: Optional notes to store on the TODO.

priority.description: Optional priority such as P0, P1, or P2. Defaults to P1.

source.description: Optional source surface. Defaults to control_plane.

source_ref.description: Optional source reference id or URL.

todo_id.description: Stable TODO id to archive as a duplicate.
Stable TODO id to archive as superseded.

tools.name: change.apply

tools.description: Compile one bounded set of typed object changes into exact reviewed bytes, baselines, diffs, and an expiring integrity digest without writing.

mode.description: Normal or explicitly reasoned break-glass operation.

operations.description: One or more typed exact KB changes.

tools.title: Preview Exact KB Changes

tools.description: Start or reuse the one active canonical knowledge-update journey. It creates only run-scoped cache state and returns the current bounded harness action.

actor.description: Human or operator identity driving the run.

observed_at.description: Optional fixed ISO end time; omitted means the latest complete UTC-day boundary.

tools.name: kb.sync.prepare
tools.title: Prepare Knowledge Sync

tools.description: Submit one harness action response, cancel a non-applying run with a bounded reason code, or apply the expiring final preview under standing safe-write authorization. Completion remembers evidence and applies only the reviewed exact patch.

apply.description: Apply the ready final preview under standing safe-write authorization.

response.description: Complete evidence, typed kb.sync.source_degradation, or judgment packet requested by next_action, or the exact closed cancellation packet {schema_version:1, kind:'kb.sync.cancel', reason_code:'lowercase_machine_code'}.

tools.name: kb.sync.resume

expires_at.description: UTC expiry bound into the digest.

evidence_committed.description: False for cancellation; no source evidence was remembered.

exact_changes_applied.description: False for cancellation; no semantic patch was applied.

reason_code.description: Machine-readable cancellation reason when status is cancelled.

status.description: Current or terminal truthful run status.

tools.title: Resume Knowledge Sync

tools.description: Read canonical sync state, next action, preview, and terminal truth.

evidence_refs.description: Optional exact secret-safe refs to inspect against the live semantic frontier without truncation.

tools.name: kb.sync.status
tools.title: Knowledge Sync Status

tools.description: Explain likely harness-neutral MCP routes, candidate tools/templates, and write policy for a freeform KB action request.

user_input.description: Freeform KB action request to route.

tools.name: policy.route_explain
tools.title: Policy Route Explain

tools.description: Return workspace Git publication state plus workflow and confirmed-control publication policy.

paths.description: Optional workspace-relative paths to scope publication status.

transaction_id.description: Optional confirmed-control transaction id to echo in the receipt.

tools.name: publication.status
tools.title: Publication Status

tools.description: Search indexed KB files and return matching file snippets and metadata.

entity_path.description: Optional canonical entity path to search within.

include_archive.description: Include archived objects in search results.

query.description: Text query to search across indexed KB content.

sync.description: Refresh the rebuildable search projection before querying.

tools.name: search.query
tools.title: Search KB

tools.description: Report resource-owned readiness for providers, plugins, sources, durable state, and workflows.

mode.description: Readiness probe depth. Cheap avoids expensive live checks.

tools.name: workspace.readiness
tools.title: Workspace Readiness
